## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? (e.g., "I often need to...")

## Proposed Solution

How should this work from a user's perspective?

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches you've thought about.

## Additional Context

Screenshots, mockups, or links to related issues.
